content.en:
In the next game, Xiao Yue still maintained a strong path to victory, defeating the first god generals in each group one by one, and in the end there were only seven games left to play.

And the remaining seven gods are each strong, and the strength they show is not weaker than Xiao Yue's.

But Xiao Yue knew very well that the remaining seven god generals were not simple, and it was very likely that they were all ten-star god generals, otherwise they would not be able to crush the other nine-star peak god generals, and they seemed to be at ease.

Finally, Xiao Yue ushered in another powerful opponent, the Red Sound Divine General who was on par with Xiao Yue.

The Red Sound God General is good at sound wave magic attacks, and his body is transformed into the power of sound waves, invisible and invisible, and his body is unpredictable, and it is difficult to attack the Red Sound God General with ordinary attacks.

Before, Luo Yu Divine General faced the Red Yin Divine General, but he didn't hurt the Red Yin Divine General at all, so he had no choice but to admit defeat and lose.

It can be seen from this that the strange power of the Red Sound Divine General.

Xiao Yue and the Red Sound God will play.

As soon as he began, the Red Sound Divine General turned into a shadowless and invisible state, and it was difficult for his divine sense to capture the figure of the Red Sound Divine General.

Rumble!!!

A sonic attack pierced through the layers of void and attacked Xiao Yue.

This kind of invisible attack such as non-ordinary sonic attack is difficult to defend against, and even the best Chaos Arcana is difficult to weaken how many sonic attacks, unless it is some Arcana that specializes in sonic attacks, it can effectively defend against the sonic attack of the Red Sound God General.

In an instant, Xiao Yue felt that countless cells in her body were shattered by a strange sonic force, and her internal organs were shattered all the time.

However, Xiao Yue had also cultivated the Blood River Immortal Technique, a chaotic supernatural power, so she recovered quickly and had almost no damage.

"Isn't it a big deal?"

Seeing that his chaotic divine power called the Immeasurable Sonic Technique was helpless, Xiao Yue couldn't help but become slightly solemn.

Before, when she used this trick to deal with Luo Yu Divine General, she injured him in an instant, and the injuries caused to him were not light.

But Xiao Yue knew the Blood River Immortal Technique, and her recovery ability was too terrifying, even if she performed the Immeasurable Sonic Technique many times, she couldn't hit Xiao Yue hard.

"You can't hide your strength, Xiao Yue is not a Luo Yu Divine General, Luo Yu Divine General is just a very demonic fighting talent, but other means are very ordinary, and Xiao Yue is perfect in all aspects, it is impossible to defeat him with the strength of a nine-star peak divine general!"

The Red Voice God thought to himself.

As a result, she no longer hides her strength.

Bang!!!!

An incomparably violent momentum erupted from the Red Sound Divine General's body, which was a momentum and power that completely surpassed the Nine-Star Peak Divine General.

"Ten Star Divine General!"

Countless True Monarchs were moved.

The ten-star god general is not an ordinary god general, one ten-star god general is enough to be worth ten nine-star peak god generals.

What's more, the Ten Star Gods will even have a good chance of becoming a Dao Ancestor by themselves in the future, without the need for some other treasures such as the Ancestral Tablet.

It can be said that the Dao Ancestor that the Ten Star Gods will achieve has great potential.

In the chaos, those Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors or Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors are all true geniuses who will be promoted up by the Ten Star Gods, while the Nine-Star Peak God Generals have limited potential in the future, if there is no big opportunity, even if they are lucky enough to become Dao Ancestors in the future, they will be at most Double Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

This is the gap between the nine-star peak god general and the ten-star god general.

And in this realm, there may not be a ten-star god born in a big era.

At least the Zhenjun present had never heard of a new ten-star god general for a long time, but the red sound god general had become a ten-star god general, which was simply incredible.

All of a sudden, countless eyes converged on the Red Sound Divine General.

And the Hongyin Divine General also enjoyed the glory of this moment, she spent too much time and opportunity to become a ten-star god general, and with the support of a Dao ancestor elder, she was lucky enough to become a ten-star god general.

At this time, one Dao Ancestor after another congratulated the Dao Ancestors of the Gumo Organization.

Strictly speaking, the Gumo Organization is not a very strong force, because this force does not use the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but it has seven First and Second Heavenly Dao Ancestors, so it has a great reputation in the chaos.

However, the Gumo Organization has always been not very good at teaching disciples, so it has not produced a few powerful disciples, but this time it has taught a ten-star divine general like the Red Sound God General, which is really shocking.

Obviously, the Gumo Organization must have gained a lot of great opportunities in the battlefield relics, otherwise there would be no way to cultivate a ten-star god general with the original Gumo Organization's heritage.

After all, if you want to become a ten-star god general, you must have the top chaos alchemy technique, and you must have a supreme foundation, plus every step must go to the extreme, so there is a glimmer of hope to step into the ten-star god general, even the transcendent forces dare not say that they will be able to cultivate a ten-star god general, and other forces naturally hope to be smaller.

Now, the Gumo organization has cultivated a ten-star god general, as long as this ten-star god general does not fall, it is very likely that a triple heavenly Dao ancestor will be born in the future.

And once the Ancient Demon Organization cultivates a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the Ancient Mo Organization will become one of the top great forces in the realm, even more powerful than the Void Heaven First Bloodline, after all, the number of Dao Ancestors in the Void Heaven One Pulse is not as good as the Ancient Mo Organization, but with the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, this can be among the top great forces.

"The Red Sound Divine General will be a ten-star divine general, coupled with the terrifying nature of that immeasurable sound technique, Xiao Yue is defeated!" some True Monarchs concluded.

"Xiao Yue, you're doomed!"

The Red Sound God will attack with all his might, and I am afraid that the immeasurable sound speed technique is more than ten times more terrifying than before.

If it is an ordinary nine-star peak god general, it will definitely be severely injured or even killed with one move, this is the terrifying thing about the ten-star god general.

However, at this time, Xiao Yue still blocked the Red Yin Divine General's immeasurable sound technique, and it didn't take too much effort.

"Another ten-star god general!"

The audience shook.

At this moment, Xiao Yue's momentum and strength are impressively ten-star god generals, and they are not ordinary ten-star god generals, and their momentum is even stronger than that of the red sound god general.

It can be seen that Xiao Yue's heritage and potential are stronger than those of the Red Sound God General!

"How can this be? Xiao Yue is just a reincarnated and recultivated god general, how can it be easy to reach this level?"

After all, if you are reincarnated and rebuilt, it is generally difficult to surpass the previous life, unless the previous life has a major flaw, but even if you can surpass, you can't surpass it too much!

What's more, Xiao Yue's reincarnation and recultivation time is not long, how can Xiao Yue grow to this level in such a short period of time?

Ye Tian!

All of a sudden, many people realized that all this was due to Ye Tian.

Before, people said that Ye Tian was only promoted to the nine-star peak god, but now no one would be so stupid to think that it would be impossible for the nine-star peak god to be so demonic.

But now, Ye Tian not only cultivated his own demons, but also cultivated his wife to such a demonic level, how many resources and treasures would it cost!

The four transcendent forces don't dare to cultivate like this, and they may not even be able to cultivate it.

Of course, everyone didn't know that Ye Tian had the talent of copying, and he could give the talent at will, and there was no need to worry about the talent.

In the past, he lacked resources and could not cultivate Xiao Yue, but now he can cultivate with all his strength.

There is no shortage of resources, no lack of talent, it is normal for Xiao Yue to grow up.

Xiao Yue burst out with the strength of the ten-star divine general, and had life-preserving magical powers such as the Blood River Immortal Technique, coupled with the three eternal divine powers of the Eternal Spear, the Eternal Gate, and the Eternal Golden Light, and forcibly suppressed the Hongyin Divine General.

This battle lasted for three hours, and finally forced the red sound god to play several hole cards, and seeing that Xiao Yue couldn't help it, and there was no hope of victory, he took the initiative to admit defeat.

And this battle completely launched Xiao Yue's name.

At this moment, she is no longer the name of Wanfa Daozi's wife, but truly has her own fame and glory!
